summary: Completed frontend testing of Time (Tiempo) improvements in ProManage ERP. All requested features verified working correctly: 1) Timer/Cronómetro removed from Tiempo tab, 2) Hours Control Cards visible on project dashboard, 3) Checkboxes in timesheet table, 4) Batch move functionality with dialog, 5) Estimated hours field in project edit dialog.

issues: Some hours show negative values (-0.79h, -0.87h) which might indicate data inconsistency from clock-out adjustments

passed_tests: Timer/Cronómetro NOT present in Tiempo tab - VERIFIED
Hours Control Card displayed on project dashboard - VERIFIED
Horas Consumidas card shows 3.57h (calculated from timesheet) - VERIFIED
Checkboxes present in each timesheet row - VERIFIED (6 checkboxes found)
Select all checkbox in table header - VERIFIED
'Mover X seleccionados' button appears when checkboxes selected - VERIFIED
Move Timesheet Dialog opens correctly - VERIFIED
Dialog shows note about hours recalculation - VERIFIED
'Horas Estimadas del Proyecto' field in Edit Project dialog - VERIFIED
Input field for estimated hours present with data-testid - VERIFIED
Backend /api/timesheet/move-batch endpoint exists and responds correctly - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: estimated_hours field shows null in API response for LARC project - should show 0 or be properly initialized
seed_data_creation: Used existing LARC project with 5 timesheet records (total 3.57h)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tiempo tab improvements fully tested.
